description: Product Description Colourful Rubber Rugby Ball and Rope Chew and Tug Toy With Squeaker Keep your furry friend entertained and their teeth clean with this vibrant rope and rubber toy. Each toy features a material rope, TPR rubber rugby ball with embedded squeaker, crafted from durable rope material in eye-catching colour combinations. Perfect for dogs of all breeds and sizes. VARIETY OF COLOURS Each colour choice has material ropes in vibrant combinations of blue, orange, and pink grey designs GREAT SIZE & DURABLE CONSTRUCTION Each rope toy is crafted from durable rope material, has a TPR rubber rugby ball. The Rope is 41cm in length and the rugby ball measures 8.5cm at maximum length. VERSATILE PLAY Ideal for interactive tug-of-war games, fetch, and solo chewing activities to prevent boredom and encourage exercise. The rubber rugby ball contains an embedded squeaker for further interaction and engagement with your pet dog. DENTAL BENEFITS Ideal for interactive tug-of-war games, fetch, and solo chewing activities to prevent boredom and encourage exercise Colourful Rubber Rugby Ball And Rope Chew and Tug Toy With Squeaker For Dental Cleaning For All Breeds Colourful Material Rope with TPR Rubber Rugby Ball and Embedded Squeaker DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Material rope design and TPR Rubber ensures long-lasting durability, perfect for aggressive chewers and regular play sessions DENTAL BENEFITS: Textured material rope and the TPR rubber rugby ball helps reduce plaque and tartar build-up whilst massaging gums and strengthening jaw muscles during play VERSATILE PLAY: Ideal for interactive tug-of-war games, fetch, and solo chewing activities to prevent boredom and encourage exercise VARIETY OF COLOURS: Each colour choice has material ropes in vibrant combinations of blue, orange, and grey designs SIZE AND MATERIAL: Each rope toy is crafted from durable rope material, has a TPR rubber rugby ball with an embedded squeaker, suitable for all dog breeds Rope Toys Are Excellent For Dogs, They Offer A Combination Of Physical, Mental, And Dental Benefits: Dental Health Dental Health : The fibrous texture of rope toys acts like floss, helping to clean your dog's teeth and reduce plaque build up as they chew. This can contribute to fresher breath and healthier gums. Mental Stimulation Mental Stimulation : Chewing and playing with rope toys keeps dogs mentally engaged, satisfying their natural instincts and reducing boredom or anxiety. Physical Exercise Physical Exercise : Rope toys are versatile and can be used for games like tug-of-war or fetch, promoting physical activity and strengthening muscles. Rope toys are designed to withstand vigorous chewing, making them a long-lasting option for dogs who love to gnaw Interactive play with rope toys fosters a stronger connection between you and your dog. Interactive play with rope toys enhances trust and communication. Always supervise your dog while they play with rope toys to ensure safety.
